channel.title: FMallSectionsDR
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from FMallSectionsDR, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Ro Khanna Highlights His Own Importance
item.description: The stunt aimed to link Ro Khanna with the phrase "presidential candidates" in mainstream media coverage.

item.title: Lindsey Graham Was a Strong Advocate for the Pro-Life Movement
item.description: The late senator approached battles to protect human life with energy and joy.

item.title: California's DEI Expansion Contradicts Newsom's Shift to Normalcy
item.description: For the California governor with presidential aspirations, change should start at home.

item.title: The Episode Where the Kardashians Save the World
item.description: A surrogacy lesson from an unexpected source that deserves attention.
